summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dual search engine app. Frontend UI/UX working perfectly with all navigation, filters, and bookmark functionality. Backend APIs responding correctly but web scraping functionality not returning search results.

critical_bugs.issue: Web scraping functions for both Yandex and DuckDuckGo returning 0 results for all queries
critical_bugs.impact: Core search functionality not working - no search results displayed to users
critical_bugs.details: API returns 200 status but empty results array. Likely causes: outdated selectors, anti-bot protection, rate limiting, or CAPTCHA challenges

passed_tests: Home page loads correctly with search input and engine badges
Search form submission and navigation to results page
Results page header with search input, filters, and bookmarks link
Filter panel opens/closes with all controls (region, date, safe search)
Filter application triggers new search request
Bookmarks page displays correctly with back navigation
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Responsive design and Swiss minimalist styling implemented correctly
Backend bookmark CRUD operations (create, read, delete)
Backend API endpoints responding with correct status codes
Error handling for non-existent bookmark deletion (404)

success_percentage.integration: 90% (UI integrates correctly with APIs, limited by scraping issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix web scraping functionality in backend/server.py. Both Yandex and DuckDuckGo scraping functions are returning 0 results. Investigate and update selectors, user agents, or implement alternative scraping approach. Consider using search APIs instead of web scraping if anti-bot measures are too restrictive.
